case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. DARBY J MILLER

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-17-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF COMPLIANCE WITH CCP SECTION 1033 (B) (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HARRIS, STELIOS A. SUBSTITUTED FOR MERRILL, ANN K. AS ATTORNEY FOR ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DARBY J

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS RE: VENUE & REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DARBY J SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC SERVED APR-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DARBY J
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DARBY J

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, DARBY J $2,955.49 PRINCIPAL, $326.31 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, $300.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,227.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DARBY J
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $300.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, DARBY J
